# Caspian Business Group

> Specialized corporate, immigration, and travel services in Yerevan, Armenia.

## Core Services
- [Company Registration](https://caspian.am/service/CompanyReg) - Fast business setup and legal registration in Armenia.
- [Residency & Immigration](https://caspian.am/service/Residency) - Legal residency permits for entrepreneurs and remote workers.
- [Schengen & European Visas](https://caspian.am/service/VisaSchengen) - Visa processing and embassy appointment assistance in Yerevan.
- [Currency Exchange & Financial](https://caspian.am/) - Secure corporate and personal exchange services.
